_notes.item_id_buckets: Stages (Field Tokens): 1-124 | Map Tiles: 600-625 | Skills: 700-723 | Battle Traits: 800-814 | Talismans: 900-952 | Shadow Cores: 1000-1016 | XP: 1100-1199 | Extra Shadow Cores: 1300-1317 | Wizard Stash Keys: 1400-1521 | Skillpoint Bundles: 1700-1709 | Achievements: 2000-2636
_notes.game_id_note: game_id is the internal engine ID (index or constant). ap_id is the Archipelago item/location ID.
_notes.scope_note: All 122 stages are in scope. W1 has no AP token (always free). Formerly trial-locked stages (FLDA5/A6, FLDB5, FLDD5, FLDE5, FLDF5, FLDH5, FLDI1, FLDK5, FLDP6, FLDR6, FLDT5, FLDZ5) are accessible via AP token instead of trial drops. W5 and G5 do not exist in the game and have been removed. W1-W4 are all free (no field token item). W2-W4 changed from pre-collected to always-free like W1.

skills.name: Freeze
skills.note: Unlocked by default in some modes

skills.name: Beam
skills.note: Unlocked by default in some modes

battle_traits.name: Adaptive Carapace
battle_traits.description: After each shot taken, monsters gain damage reduction stacking up to a cap

battle_traits.name: Dark Masonry
battle_traits.description: Barricades, nests, beacons and watchtowers have more armor/HP; extra beacons spawn every 10 waves

battle_traits.name: Swarmling Domination
battle_traits.description: Swarmlings have reduced debuff duration and more speed; some reaver waves turn into swarmlings

battle_traits.name: Corrupted Banishment
battle_traits.description: Banished monsters return with more HP, armor, and shield layers

battle_traits.name: Awakening
battle_traits.description: Monster waves have increasing HP increment per wave

battle_traits.name: Insulation
battle_traits.description: Every monster enters with extra shield layers

battle_traits.name: Swarmling Parasites
battle_traits.description: Killed monsters spawn 2 swarmlings with a portion of the monster's max HP

battle_traits.name: Thick Air
battle_traits.description: Damage to monsters is capped at a fraction of their total HP per hit

battle_traits.name: Vital Link
battle_traits.description: Each monster waiting to enter gives bonus HP to monsters already on the battlefield

battle_traits.name: Giant Domination
battle_traits.description: Giants have thicker armor and more HP; some reaver waves turn into giants

battle_traits.name: Strength in Numbers
battle_traits.description: Each monster on the battlefield gives all others extra non-destructible armor

battle_traits.name: Ritual
battle_traits.description: Powerful enemy creatures may be lured to the battle
